**Cultivate a love for nature and a connection to plants in your kids by signing up for a Children's Gardening class at Juliette Floral Design.**
**Children ages 4+ can plant their own plants.**
**You will learn :**
**\*how to select the best plant**
**\*how to prepare the soil**
**\*how to plant properly**
**\*how to care for the plant**
\*Kids will be receiving a snack and drink
\*kids will take the plant home

name: Merry little blooms Dec 21st
description:
View store information
🌸 FLORAL WORKSHOP 🌸
Join us for a fun and creative class on
Sunday Dec 21st \| 4:30 - 6:30PM
JULIETTE FLORAL DESIGN STUDIO
📍 170 5th Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11217
🌿You’ll learn how to create your very own holiday centerpiece — and you’ll get to take your beautiful arrangement home! We’ll also have yummy snacks, dessert, and drinks (both alcoholic and non-alcoholic) for you to enjoy while you create.
🌸
We provide all the materials you’ll need for this workshop — so don’t worry about a thing! Just get dressed, feel beautiful, and come enjoy a lovely afternoon with us.
There’s no better way to celebrate the season than creating something magical with your friends. (Bring a friend and you’ll receive a special discount!)
✨ Perfect for beginners or flower lovers wanting to grow your floral skills!
We can’t wait to see you there.
Blooming together. 🌸✨
🌷 Spots are limited — reserve yours today!
